specific_question: How many new customers above the age of 65 enrolled in MediConn's healthcare premium plan?
answer: Around 5000 new customers above the age of 65 enrolled in MediConn's healthcare premium plan.
justification: Customer demographics are business insights and unrelated to CPPA data governance or compliance measures.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
